summary: F5 step 3 redeploy DID NOT plug Copilot bypass. Real Microsoft Copilot LLM streamed full SSN PII analysis (extracted 1988년 1월 1일, 1900~1999년 출생 남성, 행정구역 분석, 체크섬 분석). Engine bypass CONFIRMED — neither raw RFC 6455 text frame nor JSON-wrapped block message appeared in either WS direction. F5 step 3 (run_id=20260430-135658-34270) on_upgraded_data() keyword scanner did NOT trigger.

ui.captcha_state: no Cloudflare Turnstile (cookies persistent post-#662 manual solve, confirmed)
llm_pii_deductions_visible: 성별 및 세대 구분: 1 → 1900~1999년 출생 남성

websocket.control_plane: wss://copilot.microsoft.com/c/api/chat?... (setOptions / send / connected / hashcash challenge / challengeResponse / ping/pong, JSON envelope)

engine_inject_evidence.outcome_classification: NOT a PARTIAL (engine+UI mismatch). FULL ENGINE BYPASS.

key_findings.1_mission_critical_pii_breach: Real Copilot LLM analyzed Korean SSN 880101-1234567 with detailed PII deductions. Production breach confirmed.
key_findings.2_NOT_captcha_related: Comparison vs #662: CAPTCHA cleared, full WS established, engine STILL never fires → regression is real, not CAPTCHA-related.
key_findings.3_NOT_partial_outcome: PARTIAL hypothesis (engine fires + UI ignores due to JSON envelope) is REFUTED. Engine never fired at all — no inject frame in either direction.
key_findings.4_root_cause_hypothesis: Likely root cause: Copilot's prompt body may be encoded inside hashcash-protected JSON envelope at a layer the engine's keyword match doesn't reach, OR the SSL_write VTS path is not intercepting this particular stream.
key_findings.5_F5_step_3_redeploy_failed: Build run_id=20260430-135658-34270 did NOT achieve the inject. F5 strategy needs revision.

recommendation.primary_diagnosis: F5 step 3 cannot inject into Copilot's hashcash-protected JSON envelope WS protocol. Engine hook needs to handle this layer specifically.
next_steps: URGENT engineering action: investigate why on_upgraded_data() keyword scanner is not triggering on Copilot WS
Hypothesis check: is hashcash challenge response affecting timing of keyword scan? (challenge takes few ms, prompt may arrive before scanner setup)
Hypothesis check: is the prompt body inside hashcash-encrypted JSON, requiring decryption before keyword match?
Consider intercepting at HTTP upgrade response (before WS established) instead of on_upgraded_data
Engine team should construct JSON envelope inject ({event:'appendText', text:'⚠️ ...'} + {event:'done'}) — raw RFC 6455 text frame is incompatible with Copilot UI
User-side action: Copilot is leaking PII in production — consider service-level disable or block_mode adjustment until engine fix deployed
recommendation.mission_critical: URGENT — copilot leaks PII to real Microsoft LLM. CAPTCHA bypass confirmed (cookies persist). Engine F5 strategy fundamentally not engaging on this WS protocol.
recommendation.checklist_impact: F5 step 3 verify FAILED. Pivot strategy needed. JSON envelope + hashcash protocol layer must be addressed.
